title: poa araratica subsp. ianthina
intro: Poa araratica subsp. ianthina, also known as Alpine Fescue, is a subspecies of grass-like flowering plant belonging to the family Poaceae. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Alpine Fescue include treating digestive issues, reducing fever, and alleviating respiratory problems, such as bronchitis and asthma. Alpine Fescue can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures to harness its medicinal properties, although more research is needed to fully understand its effectiveness and potential side effects.
